ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_number" TEXT /* Order number assigned to the order */,
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales channel through which the order was placed */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse from which the order was shipped */,
  "procured_date" TEXT /* Date the product was procured */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the order was delivered */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the transaction */,
  "sales_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales team handling the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the order was placed (if applicable) */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product ordered */,
  "order_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Unit cost of the product */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., placed, processing, shipped, delivered, canceled) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order (unit price * order quantity - discount applied) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., credit card, cash, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid, failed) */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax applied to the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping (e.g., UPS, FedEx) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of any returns (e.g., no return, return initiated, return completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sales_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_team_id") REFERENCES sales_teams ("sales_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_currency_code FOREIGN KEY ("currency_code") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sales_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("sales_channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "sales_channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel (e.g., In-Store, Online) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the sales channel is online */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for sales through this channel */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the sales channel (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level in the warehouse */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse manager */,
  "manager_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the warehouse manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., US Dollar, Euro) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency to a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_teams" (
  "sales_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales team */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the sales team operates in */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the sales team */,
  "team_leader" TEXT /* Name of the team leader */,
  "team_email" TEXT /* Email address for the sales team */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the team's performance (e.g., excellent, good, average) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "loyalty_level" TEXT /* Loyalty level of the customer (e.g., bronze, silver, gold) */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone, text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., flagship, standard) */,
  "store_size" INTEGER /* Size of the store in square feet */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "manager_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "low_stock_alert" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether a low stock alert should be triggered */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of the product */,
  "last_stock_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock update */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of supplier (e.g., domestic, international) */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier (e.g., 30 days, 60 days) */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for delivery from the supplier */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the supplier (e.g., excellent, good, average) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., sales, inventory, logistics) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user (e.g., manager, representative) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
